name: dropdown
label: Dropdown
description: A click-to-open menu anchored to its trigger, with configurable position, alignment, and gap.
example: Options Profile Settings

props.name: position
props.description: Which side of the trigger the menu opens on.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of the menu relative to the trigger.

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing between trigger and menu (Tailwind spacing units).

props.name: animate
props.description: Scale + fade the menu open from the corner nearest the trigger. Set false for a plain fade.

props.name: matchWidth
props.description: Match the menu width to the trigger width (useful for full-width / select-style dropdowns).

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: The clickable element that opens the dropdown.
